resources.string: To enable the app to function, allow it to display over other windows. Find the app in the list and enable this feature.

To run apps in windowed mode, you need to activate "Freeform Mode." Enable "Allow creation of freeform windows" and "Resize in multi-window mode." 

Alternatively, use the following adb commands: 
"adb shell settings put global enable_freeform_support 1" and 
"adb shell settings put global force_resizable_activities 1".
Click here to select the first app.
Click here to select the second app.
To activate \"Freeform Mode\", enable Developer Mode. Go to \"About phone\", find \"Build number\", tap it 7 times until Developer Mode is activated.
To activate \"Freeform Mode\", enable Developer Settings by running the command: \"adb shell settings put global development_settings_enabled 1\"
Adds window padding to accommodate the Status Bar and Navigation Bar. Toggle if the lower window exceeds the bottom screen edge.
Minimize after preset launch by tap
Minimize the app to avoid it appearing behind opened windows.
Extra padding prevents interface bleed-through under transparent title bars. Also shifts the \"Back\" button position on \"Dark Background\".
Size in pixels indicating how much the bottom split window overlaps the top window when \"Window shift\" is enabled.
Uses modern APIs when available on the device. Supports screen cutouts and dynamic padding. May incorrectly calculate sizes on older Android versions.
Enable if windows launch incorrectly after autorun or if minimization animation is visible during startup. Mostly required for Android 12 and above.
Split launch via Accessibility API. Compatible with Android 9 and above. Some required services may be unavailable on automotive firmware.
Interval between app launch and sending the \"play\" event. Increase if the app doesn\'t open within the given interval.
Press \"+\" to schedule an app launch
Tap \"+\" to add a quick access app
Soft close apps before window launch
Attempts to stop running apps using standard Android methods. Will not stop if the app is in foreground or high priority. May help recreate interfaces correctly.
Automatically launches GSplit after system boot.
Launches the autorun preset without displaying the app interface. If no preset is selected, the split won\'t launch, but task scheduler will run.
App waits for an internet connection before launching the autorun preset.
Launching GSplit at startup has high priority. Add a delay to let other apps load first.
Schedule launches of other apps before or after split autorun upon device startup.
If the window height is displayed incorrectly on your device, you can fix it using this setting. Works only if the \"System panels compensation\" option is enabled.

Launches Yandex Music in compatibility mode. The “Playback Autostart” feature resumes playback from the last source and opens the cover screen. Not compatible with the latest versions of Yandex Music.
Launches Murglar in compatibility mode. The "Autoplay" function opens the track cover screen and resumes playback from the last source.
Launches VKX in compatibility mode. The "Autoplay" function opens the track cover screen and resumes playback from the last source.
Are you sure you want to delete this preset?
Are you sure you want to delete this autorun?
Are you sure you want to delete this quick launch app?
Channel used to autorun presets when the device starts
To ensure launch at system startup, you need to grant accessibility permissions to the app. Go to settings, find the app in the list, and enable \"Use GSplit.\"
Enable Accessibility Monitoring in MacroDroid. Open MacroDroid -> Settings -> Accessibility Monitoring and activate it for GSplit.
Displaying the split window interaction overlay
Floating button to close open windows with one tap
Quick switching between apps in an open split
Hides the top system bar of the lower window by overlaying one window on another
Displays a dark background under open split windows
Parameters related to launching windows in freeform mode, timing settings, and general behavior
Automatic start of presets on device boot and additional launch scheduler
Sending additional actions to the opened application
Restores focus to the first window when it loses focus, ensuring the first window is always displayed above the second.
Closes the black screen after the split windows disappear from the screen.
Display an overlay button on the screen for quickly closing the split
Display an overlay button on the screen for quickly replacing windows
If your system has system-wide \"back\" gestures from the screen edges, enable this setting.
The second window will start closing only after the first window has fully closed
Returns the overlay to its initial position
Manual timing between window closings when the \"Sequential closing\" option is disabled. The slower it is, the more stable
Display the \"back\" button on a dark background
Configure a set of apps and their parameters for quick launch using the overlay button
Manage presets and windows from other apps
Transmits the current state of the split and open windows, allowing other app to determine whether a split is currently active and which specific windows are open
To activate the feature, the app requires accessibility permissions. Go to settings, find the app in the list, and enable \"Use GSplit.\"
If windows fail to launch or only the second window opens, set an additional delay for multi-window preparation.
If the second window doesn\'t launch or launches incorrectly, set an additional delay between launching apps.
Prevents dragging the overlay across the screen

If you switch to a fullscreen app from split-screen mode, the window detection service will enter standby mode after a while. Upon returning to split-screen mode, overlays will not appear, and the dark screen will not close automatically. The service will resume operation when you start a new split.
Are you sure you want to reset the overlay position?
Display the last launched split configuration in the preset list on the main screen
A more prominent border around the last launched split item
Parameters related to the execution of auxiliary ADB commands
Unlocks features related to executing ADB commands
Force-stop apps before launching in windows
Force-stop running applications via ADB command. Closes apps if they were previously opened in fullscreen mode.
A faster, more reliable, and simpler way to use overlay features. Instant split window closing via close overlay. Instant app switching via quick window replacement overlay.
Failed to retrieve data. Please check your internet connection.

Retrieving the Current Split State
In MacroDroid: Triggers -> Intent Received
Action 1: \"com.salat.gsplit.INIT_SPLIT\" - before launch
Action 2: \"com.salat.gsplit.SPLIT_STATE\" - split state

Extra 1: \"is_active\" -> value \"*\" -> select the variable to store the value.
Takes the value \"1\" when at least one window is displayed in the foreground, and \"0\" when no windows are in the foreground.

Extra 2: \"first_window\" -> value \"*\" -> select the variable to store the value.
Takes the package name of the first (top) window when the window is active; returns an empty string when no window is active.

Extra 3: \"second_window\" -> value \"*\" -> select the variable to store the value.
Takes the package name of the second (bottom) window when the window is active; returns an empty string when no window is active.

You can then monitor these variables in your scripts to detect the current split state.

Launching Presets via Shortcuts:
Send the intent \"com.salat.gsplit.PresetLauncherActivity\" and pass the parameter \"id\" with the identifier of the preset you want to launch.

Launching from MacroDroid:
Actions -> Launch Shortcut -> GSplit Preset.

Split Management
Send Broadcast -> package = \"com.salat.gsplit\" -> Required action with parameters:

Action 1: \"com.salat.gsplit.CLOSE_SPLIT\"
Closes the currently open split.

Action 2: \"com.salat.gsplit.REPLACE_WINDOW\"
Parameters: target:[first|second], package, auto_play:[0|1]
Replaces the current window of the open split with the application specified by the package name.

Action 3: \"com.salat.gsplit.LAUNCH\"
Parameters: id
Launches a preset by id. Closes the current split if it is open.

Action 4: \"com.salat.gsplit.LAUNCH_LAST\"
Launches the last used split configuration. Closes the current split if it is open.

Action 5: \"com.salat.gsplit.LAUNCH_AUTOSTART\"
Launches the autostart split configuration.

Action 6: \"com.salat.gsplit.CUSTOM_LAUNCH\"
Parameters: first_package, second_package, first_auto_play:[0|1], second_auto_play:[0|1], type:[1x1|2x1|…], dark_background:[0|1], window_shift:[0|1]
Launches a split with the specified configuration.
